title: TaskResultRequest
description: Payload for POST /tasks/{task_id}/result — agent submits completed work.

agent_id.description: agent_id of the agent submitting this result.

output.description: The result produced by the agent.

tokens_used.description: Total tokens consumed to produce this output.

signature.description: Base64-encoded RSA signature of the SHA-256 hash of the JSON-serialised output (keys sorted).
